creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
when I start 0.96.2, I get:
LibClamAV Warning: libclamav and llvm make inconsistent assumptions about CPU
architecture: 0 and 2.Please report to http://bugs.clamav.net

I filed a bug with clamav (might be clamav problem, you might want to track it)

see https://wwws.clamav.net/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=2205

How-To-Repeat: install clamav 0.96.2 and restart.
